title: S + V + O + to V（不定詞作受詞補語）

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 要求/告訴/想要/允許/期望/強迫 + 受詞 + 不定詞
主詞 + 鼓勵/說服/提醒 + 受詞 + 不定詞

explanation: 此句型為「複雜及物動詞」結構，動詞後接受詞，再接不定詞作為受詞補語，表達對他人的要求、期望或影響。關鍵在於受詞與不定詞的對應關係──受詞是不定詞動作的執行者。常見動詞包括ask、tell、want、allow、expect、force、encourage、persuade、remind等。使用時應注意：(1)這些動詞後必須接完整的受詞+不定詞結構；(2)不能直接接that子句；(3)受詞可為名詞或代詞，不定詞前不加to的情況極少見。

examples.eng: The teacher asked the students to submit their homework on time.
examples.chi: 老師要求學生準時繳交作業。

examples.eng: My parents want me to study engineering at university.
examples.chi: 我的父母想要我在大學裡讀工程系。

examples.eng: The company expects its employees to work efficiently and meet deadlines.
examples.chi: 公司期望員工們工作有效率並準時完成任務。

examples.eng: I reminded him to bring his passport before the flight.
examples.chi: 我提醒他在飛行前帶護照。

extension.tip: 判斷標準：若動詞後有「人/物（受詞）」且該人/物是下一個動作的執行者，就用「O + to V」結構。勿混淆with結構（如help sb. with sth.）或that子句用法。易錯點：force/allow後仍需加to，不能省略。

examples.test: I want you finish the project.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤 → I want you to finish the project. 須加to

examples.test: He told me studying hard is important.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤 → He told me to study hard. 動名詞改為不定詞

examples.test: The coach persuaded the players to practice every day.
examples.result: ✓ 正確 → 受詞與to V形成邏輯關係，表達說服內容

extension.note: 「受詞執行者」是關鍵：受詞做不定詞的主語，不定詞前必加to。

exercises.sentence: The principal expects all students to be respectful and honest in school.
exercises.translation: 校長期望所有學生在學校裡表現尊重他人且誠實。

exercises.sentence: My friend encouraged me to attend her painting exhibition next week.
exercises.translation: 我的朋友鼓勵我參加她下週的繪畫展覽。

exercises.sentence: The law requires companies to dispose of hazardous waste properly.
exercises.translation: 法律要求公司妥善處理危險廢棄物。

exercises.sentence: Her parents didn't allow her to stay out late every night.
exercises.translation: 她的父母不允許她每晚待在外面很晚。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 老師要求學生準時提交作業，選擇正確的句型結構。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher asked the students _______ their homework on time.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「to submit」。ask + O + to V 為標準句型，不定詞前需加 to。B 項缺少 to，違反句型結構。C 項動名詞形式不符合此句型。D 項 to 與動名詞搭配錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 父母期望孩子進入理工科大學深造，選擇正確表述。
mc_exercises.question_eng: My parents want me _______ engineering at university.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「to study」。want + O + to V 句型中，不定詞必須有 to。A 項缺少 to，為常見錯誤。C 項動名詞不符合此句型要求。D 項過去式不合語意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 經理鼓勵員工參加專業培訓課程，選擇最合適的動詞表達。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The manager _______ the employees _______ the professional training course.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「encouraged / to attend」。encourage 後接 O + to V 句型，表示鼓勵。B 項 allow 後的動名詞形式不符合標準句型。C 項 tell 後缺少 to。D 項 to attending 搭配錯誤，應為 to attend。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 請選擇最合適的動詞及其搭配結構，表達對方承諾讓孩子參加音樂課程。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She promised _______ her daughter _______ piano lessons next month.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「allow / to take」。allow 為符合此句型的「複雜及物動詞」，後接 O + to V 結構。B 項 let 不用 to（let + O + V 裸不定詞），不符合此句型。C 項結構混亂，allow 前不應有 to。D 項 let 不需 to，且句型結構錯誤。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師要求學生在下週五前完成報告。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher asked the students to finish the report by next Friday.
key_points: to finish（不定詞作受詞補語）
by next Friday（時間副詞片語）
hints: 句型框架：The teacher asked + O(the students) + to V(finish the report)；ask後需接完整的受詞加不定詞
注意：不能寫『asked that the students finish』或『asked to finish』，因為需要明確的受詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 父母期望孩子上大學後能找到好工作。
translation_exercises.answer: Parents expect their children to find good jobs after going to university.
key_points: to find（不定詞作受詞補語）
after going to university（時間狀語）
hints: 句型框架：Parents expect + O(their children) + to V(find good jobs)；expect表達『期望/預期』的含義
注意：『their children』是不定詞『find』的動作執行者，千萬不能用『that』子句代替

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 校長勸說同學們積極參與社團活動以培養領導能力。
translation_exercises.answer: The principal persuaded the students to actively participate in club activities to develop leadership skills.
key_points: to actively participate（不定詞作受詞補語，含副詞修飾）
to develop（表目的的不定詞片語）
hints: 句型框架：The principal persuaded + O(the students) + to V(participate in club activities)；persuade表達『說服』的含義
注意：『actively』修飾『participate』，整個『to actively participate』才是受詞補語；要避免寫成『persuaded that students participate』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 公司強迫員工簽署保密協議，以保護商業機密，但員工對此表示反對。
translation_exercises.answer: The company forced its employees to sign the confidentiality agreement to protect trade secrets, but the employees objected to this.
key_points: to sign the confidentiality agreement（不定詞作受詞補語，帶受詞）
object to + N/V-ing（對比結構，表反對態度）
hints: 句型框架：The company forced + O(its employees) + to V(sign the confidentiality agreement)；force表達『強制』的含義，帶有負面色彩
注意：『sign』後可直接接受詞『the agreement』；後半句『but employees objected to this』用『object to』轉折，展現複雜的語意層次
